F: I want something to turn out the way it's supposed to.
M: Well welcome to the human race.  You think this is what I had in mind?  You think that when I proposed, I had this great fantasy going that four years down the line, we'd come to the beach and yell at each other over fish?  No.
M: No, I'm just like you.  I thought it was going to be all peaches and roses and wind in our hair and sand in our toes and the fish will always come and the bills will always pay themselves.
M: And we'll have three fat rosy kids and ha, ha, ha, baby, the joke's on us, 'cause you know what you get, Carla?  You know what you get?  This.
F: This what?  What is this?  This isn't even anything.
M: Yes, it is.
F: Oh, right, sure.  This is standing on the beach.   This is waiting.  This is fighting.
M: Right.
F: But this isn't anything like I thought anything would be like.
M: No, I know, me neither.
F: This is just this.  I mean, it includes a lot and everything, but it's just not, you know, something else.  Do you have any idea what I'm trying to say?
M: I'm doing the best I can.
input.utterance: I'm doing the best I can.
input.audio_features: low speech rate, medium pitch, and high intensity
input.demonstrations:
< Speaker_F : I mean, this is, this is everything, and it's a lot, but
Speaker_F : it's not something else. Do you know what I'm trying to say?
Speaker_M : Well, I'm doing the best I can.
Last utterance label is: frustrated >
